race.description: Barrier Reef Pools Eye Liner Stakes (L)
race.comment: RESTONICA (15) was six weeks between runs when a game fourth to SOOTHSAYER over 1200m at Eagle Farm a fortnight ago. Strips fitter and will be more effective out to this trip. Big chance with a pinch of luck from the wide draw. BOOMTOWN BOSS (9) came from last on the bend to finish fifth in the Group 2 Moreton Cup at Eagle Farm recently. Gets back but over the extra 150m here will be hard to resist. SOOTHSAYER (16) cruised home over 1200m at Eagle Farm last start at the third run back from nearly three years off the scene. Has won three from five at this trip so another win is not out of reach. ESJAY (14) hasn't been far away in much better races of late. One to watch for late in the piece.
